import{createSlice,createSelector}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';export var messageSlice=createSlice({name:"message",initialState:{messages:[],isFetching:false,error:false},reducers:{// GET ALL
getMessageStart:function getMessageStart(state){state.isFetching=true;state.error=false;},getMessageSuccess:function getMessageSuccess(state,action){state.isFetching=false;state.messages=action.payload.sort(function(a,b){return b.createdAt.localeCompare(a.createdAt);});},getMessageFailure:function getMessageFailure(state){state.isFetching=false;state.error=true;},messageToggleReadStart:function messageToggleReadStart(state){state.isFetching=true;state.error=false;},messageToggleReadSuccess:function messageToggleReadSuccess(state,action){state.isFetching=false;var id=action.payload;var index=state.messages.findIndex(function(message){return message._id===id;});if(index!==-1){state.messages[index].read=!state.messages[index].read;}},messageToggleReadFailure:function messageToggleReadFailure(state){state.isFetching=false;state.error=true;},messageReadStart:function messageReadStart(state){state.isFetching=true;state.error=false;},messageReadSuccess:function messageReadSuccess(state,action){state.isFetching=false;var id=action.payload.id;var index=state.messages.findIndex(function(message){return message._id===id;});if(index!==-1){state.messages[index].read=true;}},messageReadFailure:function messageReadFailure(state){state.isFetching=false;state.error=true;},allMessagesReadStart:function allMessagesReadStart(state){state.isFetching=true;state.error=false;},allMessagesReadSuccess:function allMessagesReadSuccess(state){state.messages.forEach(function(message){message.read=true;});},allMessagesReadFailure:function allMessagesReadFailure(state){state.isFetching=false;state.error=true;}}});var _messageSlice$actions=messageSlice.actions,getMessageStart=_messageSlice$actions.getMessageStart,getMessageSuccess=_messageSlice$actions.getMessageSuccess,getMessageFailure=_messageSlice$actions.getMessageFailure,messageToggleReadStart=_messageSlice$actions.messageToggleReadStart,messageToggleReadSuccess=_messageSlice$actions.messageToggleReadSuccess,messageToggleReadFailure=_messageSlice$actions.messageToggleReadFailure,messageReadStart=_messageSlice$actions.messageReadStart,messageReadSuccess=_messageSlice$actions.messageReadSuccess,messageReadFailure=_messageSlice$actions.messageReadFailure,allMessagesReadStart=_messageSlice$actions.allMessagesReadStart,allMessagesReadSuccess=_messageSlice$actions.allMessagesReadSuccess,allMessagesReadFailure=_messageSlice$actions.allMessagesReadFailure;export{getMessageStart,getMessageSuccess,getMessageFailure,messageToggleReadStart,messageToggleReadSuccess,messageToggleReadFailure,messageReadStart,messageReadSuccess,messageReadFailure,allMessagesReadStart,allMessagesReadSuccess,allMessagesReadFailure};export default messageSlice.reducer;export var selectAllMessages=function selectAllMessages(state){return state.message.messages;};export var selectMessagesByUser=createSelector([selectAllMessages,function(state,userId){return userId;}],function(messages,userId){return messages.filter(function(message){return message.userId===userId;});});
